concerns.text: FR-006 mandates 'Repeated Measures ANOVA' but the tasks (T032, T033) implement Linear Mixed-Effects Modeling (LMM) and Tukey post-hoc. While the plan correctly identifies LMM as necessary for nested data, there is NO task explicitly tagged or described to update the spec to reflect LMM instead of ANOVA, leaving the requirement unimplemented as written.

SC-001 requires measuring RMSE and MAE. Tasks T027 and T034 log Predictive Variance and Calibration Slope (per Constitution VI), but there is no task explicitly covering the Success Criteria requirement to measure these additional metrics against the fixed test set as defined in SC-001. The SC is incomplete relative to the implementation.

FR-007 requires sensitivity analysis with 'trend stability' but lacks the explicit 'slope variance < 10%' metric found in the plan. Task T036 implements the 10% check, but there is no task to update FR-007 in the spec to include this specific quantitative threshold, creating a gap between the spec requirement and the implemented task.

The spec assumes 'no authentication barriers' for the MP API. Task T008 implements `MP_API_KEY` configuration. There is no task to update the spec's Assumptions section to acknowledge the API key requirement, leaving the spec factually incorrect regarding the implementation.

FR-003 mandates subsets of the 'full dataset' (implied 150k), while the plan and tasks (T020) cap the baseline at 30k RSS. There is no task to update FR-003 to clarify the 30k RSS baseline, leaving the requirement ambiguous and contradictory to the implementation.

Task T015 saves the cleaned pool to `data/raw/full_pool.csv`. The plan (Phase 0) and T018 indicate processed data (descriptors, test sets) belongs in `data/processed/`. This is a minor directory structure inconsistency in the task description relative to the plan's data hygiene rules.
